title: SoT Run Identity
description: Schema for the run identity of a SoT convergence run. Each instance uniquely identifies a single convergence execution, linking the contract, commits, report, and evidence by their cryptographic hashes.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier in compact ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g. 20260310T120000Z).

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this convergence run was executed.

contract_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the convergence contract used for this run.

contract_version.description: Semantic version of the convergence contract.

canonical_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the canonical repository at scan time.

derivative_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the derivative repository at scan time.

report_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the convergence findings report produced by this run.

evidence_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence archive produced by this run.

decision.description: Overall gate decision for this convergence run.

pipeline_version.description: Version of the convergence pipeline that executed this run.

findings_count.description: Aggregated finding counts by severity level.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the convergence run in seconds.
